title: Workspace template testing
excerpt: Is there any way to test/use a workspace template that I created in my app before publishing the app? Just like I can create integration recipes and use them in my workspace, I also want to test my workspace template. Is…

posts.author: devagrawal09 (Dev Agrawal)
posts.cookedHtml: Is there any way to test/use a workspace template that I created in my app before publishing the app? Just like I can create integration recipes and use them in my workspace, I also want to test my workspace template. Is there any way to do that?

posts.author: dsilva (Daniel Silva)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @devagrawal09 - as long as the application in which the workspace template is in is installed on your account, you should be able to test this.

To do this - go to a separate workspace on your account (or create a new ‘test’ one). When you try to add a new board template, you can find your template there.

-Daniel

posts.author: system (system)
posts.cookedHtml: This topic was automatically closed 7 days after the last reply. New replies are no longer allowed.
